profile.name: Sujit Gajare
profile.title: Senior Frontend Developer (Angular)
profile.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with 4.5+ years of experience building scalable enterprise web applications using Angular. Proven expertise in micro-frontend architecture, performance optimization, and API integration. Demonstrated track record of improving application performance, increasing test coverage, and delivering production-grade solutions in Agile environments.

achievements.heading: Quality Assurance Improvement
achievements.description: – Increased unit test coverage from 55% to 85% using Jasmine and enforced quality gates through SonarQube.

achievements.heading: Performance Optimization
achievements.description: – Improved core application performance resulting in a 30% improvement in initial page load time.

achievements.heading: Awards
achievements.description: – Awarded multiple Rise and Insta Awards at Infosys for delivery excellence, innovation, and consistent high performance on enterprise projects.
